message:
feat(harness): integrate ActionMapper for Pi-style keybinding policy (bd-2vne.1)

Integrated the ftui-core ActionMapper into the agent harness to implement
the Pi-style keybinding policy. This provides:

Contextual keybinding behavior:
- Escape: Clear input (if text), cancel task (if running), close overlay
- Esc Esc: Toggle tree view overlay (double-tap within 250ms)
- Ctrl+C: Clear input, cancel task, or quit (priority cascade)
- Ctrl+D: Soft quit (cancel task first if running)
- Ctrl+Q: Hard quit (immediate exit)
- Ctrl+T: Theme cycling (harness-specific, unchanged)

Implementation:
- Added ActionMapper field and tree_view_open state
- Added app_state() method to compute current AppState
- Refactored handle_key() to use ActionMapper.map()
- Added handle_action() for resolved action dispatch
- Added handle_raw_key() for passthrough input
- Integrated timeout check into spinner tick for Esc Esc detection
- Added 'tree' command and status output

The harness now serves as a reference implementation for the keybinding
policy documented in docs/spec/keybinding-policy.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
